extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters Against and By: I counted criminal proceedings Against the Company (4), Subsidiaries (Nil), Directors (14) and Promoters (13), excluding all By rows; statutory/regulatory actions counted were Against the Company (10), Subsidiaries (Nil), Directors (4) and Promoters (2), while tax proceedings counted only for the Company (52) and Subsidiaries (1), excluding promoter/director tax matters. The quantified aggregate against the Company and Subsidiaries is the sum of the stated Against Company amounts of ₹58.31 million civil, ₹30.00 million criminal and ₹1,368.24 million tax, plus the Subsidiaries’ ₹1.87 million tax amount, totalling ₹1,458.42 million, or ₹145.842 crore; By matters and personal promoter/director matters are excluded. The contingent-liabilities figure is the explicitly stated consolidated Total of ₹2,772.92 million as of June 30, 2023, converted to ₹277.292 crore; the source tables use ₹ million, so each crore figure is obtained by dividing by 10. No company-wide top-five or top-ten customer revenue concentration percentage is disclosed; the percentages provided relate to business divisions, suppliers, raw-material purchases or other measures, not company-wide customer revenue from operations or total income.
